title: BSP PM and bus-clock enable audit
observations: BSP probe/resume enables reset, AHB, store, MBUS, MSI-lite, and MMC clocks before host initialization.
The local diagnostic branch enables reset, AHB, mmc_store, mmc_mbus, mmc_msi_lite, and MMC clocks before host initialization.
The local runtime-resume path re-enables the same clock/reset set, initializes the host, restores bus width and clock, then enables IRQ.
No extra BSP PM-only fabric, firewall, or security step was found.
reason: The BSP PM/bus-clock sequencing is already represented locally and does not reveal a new SDMMC0 IDMAC descriptor-fetch precondition.
next: Do not reopen PM/bus-clock enable ordering without new evidence for a specific missing SDMMC0 fabric bit.
